chosen:
def extended_gcd(a, b):
    old_r, r = a, b
    old_s, s = 1, 0
    old_t, t = 0, 1
    while r:
        q = old_r // r
        old_r, r = r, old_r - q*r
        old_s, s = s, old_s - q*s
        old_t, t = t, old_t - q*t
    if old_r < 0:

    from collections import Counter
    need=Counter(required)
    if not need:return ""
    missing=len(required); left=0; best=None

        if need[ch]>0:missing-=1
        need[ch]-=1

            if best is None or right-left+1<best[0]:best=(right-left+1,left,right+1)

def course_order(course_count, prerequisites):
    graph=[[] for _ in range(course_count)];degree=[0]*course_count
    for course,pre in prerequisites:graph[pre].append(course);degree[course]+=1
    queue=[i for i,d in enumerate(degree) if d==0];out=[]
    for u in queue:
        out.append(u)
        for v in graph[u]:degree[v]-=1;queue.append(v) if degree[v]==0 else None
    return out if len(out)==course_count else []

chosen:
from collections import Counter,defaultdict

def eulerian_trail(edges):
    edges=list(edges)
    if not edges: return []
    graph=defaultdict(list); indegree=Counter(); outdegree=Counter()
    for u,v in edges: graph[u].append(v); outdegree[u]+=1; indegree[v]+=1
    starts=[n for n in set(indegree)|set(outdegree) if outdegree[n]-indegree[n]==1]
    ends=[n for n in set(indegree)|set(outdegree) if indegree[n]-outdegree[n]==1]
    if len(starts)>1 or len(ends)>1 or any(abs(indegree[n]-outdegree[n])>1 for n in set(indegree)|set(outdegree)): return None
    start=starts[0] if starts else edges[0][0]; stack=[start]; path=[]
    while stack:
        if graph[stack[-1]]: stack.append(graph[stack[-1]].pop())
        else: path.append(stack.pop())
    return path[::-1] if len(path)==len(edges)+1 else None

    for node in lists:
